data.title: Binance will update leverage and margin for multiple U-margin perpetual contracts
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Binance Futures will update the leverage and margin tiers of AMBUSDT, STMXUSDT, MKRUSDT, ETCUSDT, TIAUSDT, OMUSDT and BNXUSDTU perpetual contracts at 17:30 (Beijing time) on February 18, 2025. Users' existing positions before the update will be affected, and users are advised to make corresponding preparations before the adjustment. (This newsletter is generated by AI)

data.title: The address that spent $16.41 million to build PNUT, ai16z and arc positions in the past three months may belong to Galaxy Digital, with a loss of more than $8 million
If ETH falls below $2,600, there will be no altcoin season
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that on-chain analyst Ali wrote that if ETH falls below $2,600, there will be no copycat season.

data.title: Tether Signs Agreement with the Republic of Guinea to Explore Applications of Blockchain and Peer-to-Peer Technologies
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Cointelegraph published an article on the X platform stating that Tether has signed an agreement with the Republic of Guinea to explore the application of blockchain and peer-to-peer technology. The agreement aims to share best practices with this West African country, focusing on education, innovation and sustainable technology practices.

data.title: Karen, founder of Alfa Partnes, a one-stop crypto AI trading service provider: On-chain liquidity innovation is changing the competitive landscape between DEX and CEX
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News At the Consensus HK Summit, Karen, founder of Alfa Partnes, a global one-stop encrypted AI trading service provider, said in a guest speech at the MemeX Festival that on-chain liquidity innovation is changing the competitive landscape of DEX and CEX. The current market is highly fragmented, new projects emerge, and attention is distracted, which exacerbates volatility, and users are turning from long-term holding strategies to short-term trading trends. Investors need to flexibly adjust their strategies to cope with uncertainty. At the same time, macroeconomic factors and liquidity changes further affect the market landscape, and the role of trading service providers is particularly important. "As a guide and provider of asset management and trading services, we focus on providing AI automation services for projects and memes in the Web3 ecosystem. By providing liquidity, stabilizing the market, supporting the cold start of new projects, and optimizing price discovery, we can help users and project parties find opportunities in market uncertainty." The success of trading service providers will depend on their keen insight into market changes, refined operations on liquidity management, and the ability to respond quickly to emerging trends. In the future, they will not only be liquidity providers in the market, but also an important force to promote market innovation and efficiency.

data.title: Cryptocurrency Market Experiences Significant Liquidations
data.description: According to BlockBeats, data from Coinglass reveals that the cryptocurrency market witnessed liquidations totaling $92.31 million over the past four hours. Of this amount, long positions accounted for $86.17 million, while short positions saw liquidations of $6.14 million.

data.title: In the past 4 hours, the two whales have deposited 5,800 ETH to the exchange, equivalent to about 15.73 million US dollars
Whales Transfer Significant Ethereum Holdings to Exchanges
data.description: According to Odaily, on-chain analyst Ai Yi has reported that in the past four hours, two major Ethereum holders have transferred a total of 5,800 ETH to exchanges, valued at $15.73 million. The address 0xc8D...Be2CD sold 3,100 ETH, which were acquired in April 2023 at an average price of $1,890. If sold, this would result in a profit of $2.546 million. Meanwhile, the address 0x41A...F7277 sold 2,700 ETH, which were withdrawn from exchanges eight months ago at a peak price of $3,499, potentially incurring a loss of $1.655 million if sold.

data.title: Megabit will launch PI/USDT contract trading
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Megabit will officially launch PI/USDT perpetual contract trading at 16:00 (SGT) on February 20.

data.title: Elon Musk's D.O.G.E. Targets SEC Amid XRP Speculation
data.description:
According to CoinDesk, the Department of Government Efficiency (D.O.G.E), led by Elon Musk, has turned its attention to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC), sparking interest among XRP enthusiasts. On Monday, a newly created account associated with D.O.G.E. on social media platform X called for public assistance in identifying and addressing waste, fraud, and abuse related to the SEC. This move has fueled speculation among XRP holders, who hope that public involvement or findings from this initiative might uncover potential conflicts of interest or misconduct within the SEC. Such revelations could potentially weaken the SEC's position in its ongoing appeal against Ripple, which could positively impact XRP prices if developments are seen as favorable for the token or influence the SEC's approach to cryptocurrency cases.

The SEC's legal battle with Ripple Labs began in 2020 when the commission accused Ripple of conducting an unregistered securities offering with its XRP token. The case concluded in Ripple's favor in 2024, but the appeal process is still underway, leaving the case unresolved. D.O.G.E., a temporary non-governmental agency, was established by Musk to reduce excessive regulations, eliminate wasteful spending, and restructure federal agencies. The agency draws its theme from dogecoin (DOGE), a memecoin that Musk has frequently promoted in recent years.

Under the previous Biden administration, the SEC was known for its stringent stance on local cryptocurrency companies and token issuers. However, this approach has begun to shift since U.S. President Donald Trump took office on January 20, 2025, who is perceived as more crypto-friendly. Despite the ongoing developments, XRP prices have decreased by 1.4% over the past 24 hours, outperforming a 2% decline in bitcoin (BTC) and a 2.5% drop in the broader market as tracked by the CoinDesk 20 index.
